entities.name: User
entities.description: Supabase Auth と同期されるユーザーアカウント。public.users で Auth と紐付け

access_control_policies.name: users_self_select
access_control_policies.predicate: id = auth.uid()
access_control_policies.rationale: 自分のレコードのみ閲覧

access_control_policies.name: users_self_update
access_control_policies.predicate: id = auth.uid()
access_control_policies.rationale: 自分のレコードのみ更新

access_control_policies.name: users_admin_select
access_control_policies.predicate: raw_app_meta_data->>'role' = 'admin'
access_control_policies.rationale: 運営管理者は全件閲覧可

access_control_policies.name: workflow_outputs_project_member_select

access_control_policies.name: workflow_outputs_client_select
access_control_policies.predicate: project_id = (current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true)::jsonb->>'project_id')::uuid AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM client_invitations WHERE project_id = workflow_outputs.project_id AND token_hash = current_setting('request.jwt.claims', true)::jsonb->>'invitation_token_hash' AND expires_at > now() AND revoked_at IS NULL)
access_control_policies.rationale: クライアント招待経路（別JWT）

access_control_policies.name: workflow_outputs_member_insert

access_control_policies.name: chat_threads_service_role_insert

access_control_policies.name: chat_threads_client_denied

access_control_policies.name: chat_messages_via_thread_select
access_control_policies.predicate: thread_id IN (SELECT id FROM chat_threads WHERE project_id IN (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE workspace_id IN (SELECT workspace_id FROM workspace_memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid())))

access_control_policies.name: chat_messages_member_insert
access_control_policies.predicate: thread_id IN (SELECT id FROM chat_threads WHERE project_id IN (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE workspace_id IN (SELECT workspace_id FROM workspace_memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND role IN ('owner','member'))))

access_control_policies.name: chat_messages_service_role_insert
access_control_policies.predicate: true

access_control_policies.name: chat_messages_self_update
access_control_policies.predicate: role = 'user' AND thread_id IN (SELECT id FROM chat_threads WHERE project_id IN (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE workspace_id IN (SELECT workspace_id FROM workspace_memberships WHERE user_id = auth.uid() AND role IN ('owner','member'))))
access_control_policies.rationale: F-E03 人間直編集即反映

entities.name: Task
entities.description: 1-2日粒度のタスクカード。F-016で分解、F-018で実行

fields.name: category
fields.note: かんばんのグルーピング（機能/画面/フェーズ別）

fields.name: parent_task_id
fields.note: F-CUC02 リファクタタスクの親タスク（completed タスクへの追従用）

fields.name: lifecycle_stage
fields.note: Hermes 6 列モデル。UI 表示: 準備中/着手可/実装中/要対応/承認待ち/完了

fields.name: summary
fields.note: Hermes 互換: kanban_complete 時に worker が記述する完了サマリ。下流タスクへハンドオフ

fields.name: metadata
fields.note: Hermes 互換: kanban_complete 時の構造化メタデータ。下流タスクへハンドオフ

fields.name: blocked_reason
fields.note: Hermes 互換: kanban_block(reason) で記録、Blocked 列から脱出時に worker が参照

fields.name: retry_count
fields.note: F-DISP01 サーキットブレーカ用、3 超過で Blocked 固定

fields.name: worktree_path
fields.note: F-BRIDGE01 が git worktree add で作成したパス。例: ../worktrees/T-014

fields.name: dispatch_status
fields.note: Bridge worker プロセスの低レベル状態。lifecycle_stage と独立、PID ポーリング用

fields.name: worker_pid
fields.note: Bridge が spawn した PTY プロセスの PID。dispatch_status=dead 検出に使用

fields.name: worker_last_heartbeat_at
fields.note: F-DISP01 が PID ポーリング時に更新

indexes.name: idx_tasks_active
indexes.where: status NOT IN ('completed', 'blocked') AND deleted_at IS NULL

indexes.name: idx_tasks_lifecycle_stage
indexes.note: Hermes 6 列モデルでのレーン別取得

indexes.name: idx_tasks_dispatch_active
indexes.note: F-DISP01 PID ポーリング用
